subject: Re: Error: "System.Exception" in M subtomo refine AGAIN
body:
Thank you for your guidance.

I tested the parameters like this. And then, it stopped in this step. It 
seemed like that there were still something wrong.

在2021年5月4日星期二 UTC+8 下午7:58:28<p.sha...@gmail.com> 写道：

> Are you at a resolution that justifies refinement of higher order
> Zernike polynomials and defocus? What happens if you just run the
> "vanilla" steps i.e. pose, stage angle, image and volume warp
> refinement?
> Best,
> Pranav
> --
> Pranav Shah
> Postdoctoral Research Fellow.
>
> Division of Structural Biology,
> Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
> University of Oxford,
> Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
> UK
>
>
> On Tue, May 4, 2021 at 12:40 PM yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com> wrote:
> >
> > And the warp.exe had some error information.
> >
> > And some parameter about refinement.
> > 在2021年5月4日星期二 UTC+8 下午7:07:21<yuqi zhang> 写道：
> >>
> >> When I did the sub-tomo averaging refinement, it stopped at this step 
> in the figure.
> >>
> >> I wanted to know how to deal with that.
> >>
> >> The GPU was Quadro GV100 32GB *2. The memory size was 128GB.
> >
